metadata.title: OpenCore Legacy Patcher Error Guide
metadata.description: Use an unofficial OCLP error triage page for model, root patch, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and non-Metal GPU troubleshooting paths.

checker.title: Start OCLP error triage with model and hardware context
checker.description: Most OCLP errors are easier to reason about after you know the exact Mac model, target macOS, GPU class, and wireless hardware.

workflow.title: Error triage sequence
workflow.description: Do not jump to random patches before narrowing the failure category.

items.title: Record model and macOS
items.description: Write down model identifier, target macOS, and OCLP version.

items.title: Separate boot from post-install
items.description: Boot failures and post-install feature failures usually have different causes.

items.title: Check root patches
items.description: Graphics and wireless behavior may depend on root patch status.

items.title: Use official troubleshooting
items.description: Use official docs and issue context before changing EFI or system files.
